title: Enhanced Contact System & Performance Boost
description: We've upgraded RPLY's contact system to give you more flexibility in how you connect with others. This release includes important behind-the-scenes improvements that make the app faster and more reliable for everyone.
features: You can now find and message contacts using their phone numbers, not just email addresses
fixes: Resolved messaging issues that could prevent chats from loading properly
Streamlined the app by removing outdated code for a smoother, faster experience
